description_long: This is a vintage, tan-colored volleyball with a classic stitched leather exterior, featuring visible seams and a slightly worn surface. The ball is marked with bold, dark text reading 'HANDBALL-SPECIAL' and 'WM 1964 Tschechoslowakei', indicating it was produced for a 1964 handball event in Czechoslovakia. The surface shows faint, hand-written signatures or inscriptions in green and blue ink, suggesting it may have been used as a commemorative or collectible item. The ball is constructed from several elongated, curved leather panels stitched together, giving it a segmented appearance. The leather has a matte finish with some minor discoloration and scuffing, especially near the seams. There are no visible brand logos apart from the event and type markings.
description: A vintage tan volleyball with stitched leather panels, event markings, and faint signatures, showing minor wear and a matte finish.
description_view_0: The top view highlights the curved leather panels and faint signatures, with seams and slight discoloration visible.
description_view_1: The front view prominently displays the 'HANDBALL-SPECIAL' and 'WM 1964 Tschechoslowakei' text, with clear panel seams and some surface wear.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the plain leather surface, curved panels, and more faint signatures, with less visible text.
description_view_3: Another front view with the event text visible, showing the panel arrangement and additional signatures on the surface.
attribute_stitching_type: hand-stitched, visible seams along panel edges with regular stitch pattern
attribute_wear_marks: minor scuff marks and discoloration near seams, faded ink signatures
